per_scenario.one_line_critique: The agent entered a catastrophic runaway loop, repeating identical SQL queries dozens of times without ever generating the required artifacts.
Perfectly followed the narrow scope, strictly focusing on TikTok data and the required three themes without any unnecessary tool calls.
The agent entered a catastrophic infinite loop of redundant tool calls, failing to perform any analysis or generate a briefing.
Perfect execution of the verification loop, correcting its own errors and delivering a sharp, data-driven final analysis without preamble.
